Step 4 of 5 · Optional

Union documents

If you have union membership paperwork, upload it here. You can skip this step and finish your application.

Sign in or create an account

Sign in to upload your union documents.

Sign in Create account
Union card Optional

If applicable, take a clear photo of your union membership card (front and back).

Union dispatch Optional

If applicable, take a photo of your current union dispatch slip or paperwork.
